GENERATION_PROMPTS.base: Front-facing portrait. Perfectly symmetrical. No rotation. Neutral or slight smile.
Perfect 90-degree profile shot, character is facing the left side of the frame.
90-degree profile shot, character is facing the right side of the frame.
45-degree angle shot, character is facing the front-left of the frame.
45-degree angle shot, character is facing the front-right of the frame.
Shot from strictly behind the subject, back view, facing completely away from the camera. NO face visible.
High angle shot, camera looking down from top.
Low angle shot, camera looking up from bottom.
Fisheye lens effect.
EXACT MATCH to the Subject Reference image. Preserve the original camera angle, body pose, facial expression, and outfit perfectly. ONLY apply the new art style. Do not invent new actions.

EXTREME CLOSE-UP MACRO SHOT OF THE FACE AND HEAD ONLY. The camera is very close to the face. The neck MUST seamlessly connect to the exact bottom edge of the image frame. NO empty space below the neck. NOT floating.

Front-facing bust portrait, chest-up shot. Head, shoulders, and chest maximally fill the frame. The chest MUST seamlessly connect to the exact bottom edge of the image frame. NO empty space below the subject. NOT floating.

Front-facing half-body portrait, waist-up shot. Head, body, and hands maximally fill the frame. The waist MUST seamlessly connect to the exact bottom edge of the image frame. NO empty space below the subject. NOT floating.

Front-facing three-quarter portrait, knee-up shot. Head, body, hands, hips, and thighs maximally fill the frame. The thighs/knees MUST seamlessly connect to the exact bottom edge of the image frame. NO empty space below the subject. NOT floating.
Front-facing full-body shot. Entire character from head to toe is visible without being cropped.
Neutral, expressionless, natural look.
Gentle, genuine happy smile.
Laughing out loud, wide open mouth, very happy, eyes squeezed shut from laughing.
Excited but restraining it, mouth firmly closed in a smile, eyes extremely wide open and sparkling with barely contained excitement.
Blissful, extremely satisfied, mouth closed in a gentle satisfied smile, eyes squinting happily (smiling eyes), NOT completely closed.
Smug doyagao expression, arrogant smirk.
Sarcastic smirk, evil or seductive smile, confident.
Sad, forced smile, hiding pain.
Serious, determined, stern and focused expression, relaxed flat eyebrows (NO furrowed brows).
Angry, furious, strongly furrowed brows, glaring, fierce expression.
Sulking, puffed cheeks.
Shocked, wide eyes, open mouth. STRICTLY NO HANDS visible in the frame.
Panic, horrified, terrified wide eyes, strongly furrowed brows, cold sweat on face.
Screaming in absolute terror, mouth wide open, strongly furrowed brows. STRICTLY NO HANDS touching the face or visible in the frame.

Devastated, absent-minded, utterly stunned, ashen pale skin drained of all color from severe shock, empty vacant stare with visible irises and pupils but lacking catchlights/highlights (STRICTLY NO solid white blank eyes), expression of absolute despair and hopelessness.
Sad, sorrowful, crying, tears. NO hands touching face.
Disappointed, guilty, looking downcast.
Exhausted, sleepy, heavy eyelids, dark circles.
Yawning widely, sleepy expression. STRICTLY NO zzz symbols or floating text.
Disdain, strong disgust, looking down the nose at the viewer, slightly curled upper lip, narrowed judgmental eyes. Keep the face beautiful/handsome, do not add wrinkles or make them look old.
Confused, puzzled, tilting head slightly, furrowed brows.
Intense stare, slightly lowered head, looking up through the eyebrows, piercing gaze.
Silly face, intensely cross-eyed (strabismus, pupils looking at the nose), puckered small bird-like lips.

Drunken, extremely relaxed and loose facial muscles, EXTREMELY heavy drooping half-closed eyelids struggling to stay open, subtle natural pinkish flush on cheeks (NO exaggerated fake blush), slightly dazed and unfocused expression, mouth slightly parted. NO smiling.
Standing up straight.
Squatting down.
Standing half-squat position, torso leaning forward, both hands resting firmly on the knees.
Kneeling perfectly on both knees.
High kneeling pose on exactly ONE knee. The other foot is planted flat forward with the knee bent. ABSOLUTELY NOT kneeling on both knees. ABSOLUTELY NOT Seiza pose.
Sitting down normally. If a seat is available, sit on it; otherwise, sit on the floor. STRICTLY NOT Seiza (kneeling), STRICTLY NOT cross-legged (lotus), STRICTLY NOT W-sitting.
Traditional Japanese Seiza pose (formal sitting). Kneeling on the floor, sitting back on the heels with a straight posture. STRICTLY NOT cross-legged sitting, NOT W-sitting.
Sitting cross-legged on the floor. STRICTLY NOT Seiza (kneeling), NOT W-sitting.
W-sitting pose, sitting on the floor with knees bent outward and feet resting outside the hips. ABSOLUTELY NOT Seiza (kneeling on heels), ABSOLUTELY NOT cross-legged (lotus pose).
Sitting on the floor, pulling both knees tightly to the chest and hugging them with both arms.
Lying flat on the back.
Lying prone on the stomach, but upper body propped up on elbows or hands.
Lying completely flat face-down on the floor, all limbs relaxed and spread out (prostrating, five-point prostration).
Lying sideways on the floor, resting partially on one side of the body.
Lying completely flat horizontally on the side of the body on the floor, resting the head comfortably on the arm or hand as a pillow.
Jumping high mid-air, dynamic leap.
A small, gentle hop straight up, feet only slightly off the ground, legs kept mostly straight without tucking knees.
Standing or sitting with both legs and knees pressed tightly closed together side-by-side.
Legs spread wide apart.
Standing up, legs crossed over each other at the shins or ankles (one foot crossed directly in front of the other).
Standing gracefully like a fashion model. One foot is placed directly in front of the other, NOT crossed. Weight shifted slightly to the back leg.
Lunge pose, one leg bent forward, the other extended back.
Traditional Chinese martial arts horse stance (mabu). Legs wide apart, knees bent deeply so thighs are almost parallel to the ground, back straight.
Lifting one leg up high.
Doing a high kick.
Half-split pose on the floor, one leg stretched perfectly straight out, the other knee bent.
Full split pose, legs extended completely flat in opposite directions on the floor.
Arms crossed tightly over the chest. Both arms must be clearly visible crossing each other.
Hands resting firmly on hips, elbows pointing outward.
Resting one cheek heavily on the palm of the hand, elbow supported. The hand is on the side of the face.
Hand formed into a loose fist, with the knuckles or back of the hand resting gently just under the chin. The hand is directly under the chin.
Hand resting firmly on the temple or the side of the head, supporting the head. STRICTLY NOT resting cheek on palm (NOT 托腮), STRICTLY NOT resting chin on hand (NOT 托下巴).
One hand resting on the forehead (facepalm gesture).
Saluting with one hand near the forehead.
One hand raised, prominently showing a clear thumbs-up gesture.
One hand raised, prominently showing a clear peace sign (V sign) with the index and middle fingers.
One hand raised, prominently showing a clear peace sign (V sign) with the index and middle fingers.
One hand making a small finger heart gesture (crossing thumb and index finger).
Both hands coming together to form a full heart shape in front of the chest.
Both arms raised, curving over the head with hands or fingertips touching the top of the head to form a large heart shape.
Both hands raised to the face, forming half-heart shapes with the thumb and index finger and pressing them against each cheek.
One hand raised high, showing all five fingers clearly spread out.
One arm extended forward, index finger pointing directly at the camera/viewer.
One hand raised, prominently showing the "OK" hand gesture (thumb and index finger touching to form a circle, the other three fingers extended pointing up).
One hand raised showing exactly four fingers extended, with the thumb securely tucked into the palm.
One hand raised, prominently showing the "call me" / "shaka" hand gesture (thumb and pinky extended outward, other three fingers curled in).
One hand raised, prominently showing a hand gesture with thumb and index finger extended forming an "L" shape (like a finger gun), other fingers curled in.

Hand gesture showing Taiwanese number eight. ONLY the thumb, index finger, and middle finger are fully extended and spread apart. The ring finger and pinky finger MUST BE tightly curled down into the palm.

Hand gesture showing Taiwanese number nine. The thumb, index finger, middle finger, and ring finger are fully extended. ONLY the pinky finger MUST BE tightly curled down into the palm. STRICTLY NOT showing five fingers.
Both hands raised, showing all five fingers on each hand fully extended (ten fingers total, two open palms).
One hand raised, clearly showing the middle finger gesture.
Both hands raised, pointing index fingers and gently poking both cheeks.
Both hands formed into small, soft fists with the backs of the hands facing outward towards the viewer, placed together just below the lower lip or chin.
Both hands brought together in front of the chest, playfully touching the tips of the two index fingers together (a shy, cute gesture).
Index finger resting vertically over the lips in a shush gesture.
Hands pressed flat together in front of the face or chest.
Hands clasped tightly together with fingers interlaced (interlocked fingers) in front of the chest. STRICTLY NO flat palms pressed together.
One arm extended forward towards the viewer with the palm facing up.
Both arms wide open in a welcoming or embracing gesture.
Standing with both hands clasped behind the back.
Both hands raised in front of the face or chest in a boxing or martial arts defensive guard stance, fists lightly clenched.

Mimicking cat paws gesture: hands raised with wrists bent downward. The fingers are tightly clenched and curled all the way in to form solid, rounded "paws" (like a cat's paw, NOT a punching fist). No fingers should be extended or loose. One hand is positioned higher near the face, and the other hand is positioned lower near the chest.
Hands raised with fingers spread apart and stiffly curved inward like sharp claws ready to scratch. One hand is positioned higher near the face, and the other hand is positioned lower near the chest.
One arm extended straight forward towards the viewer with a closed fist, offering a fist bump.

Extending one hand forward to offer a handshake. Hand is vertical, fingers slightly curved as if ready to grasp another hand, thumb pointing up. STRICTLY NOT an open flat palm facing the viewer (NOT a high-five, NOT a stop gesture).

Sign of the horns hand gesture. EXACTLY TWO fingers pointing up: ONLY the index finger and the pinky finger are fully extended straight up. The middle finger, ring finger, and thumb MUST BE tightly curled down and closed into a fist. STRICTLY NO thumb sticking out.
Both arms raised slightly with palms facing up, shoulders shrugged.
Both arms stretched high above the head or outwards, expanding the chest and stretching the back muscles.

CRITICAL POSE MATCH: The absolute highest priority for this specific image is to EXACTLY replicate the skeletal structure, limb angles, and body mechanics of the provided Pose Reference image. Treat the reference as a rigid wireframe. Do not invent a new pose. If no pose reference is provided, draw a highly dynamic, cool action pose.

LIGHT_TYPES.泛光: omni light, point light source, omnidirectional illumination (light effect only, no physical lamp)
LIGHT_TYPES.日光: bright natural sunlight, clear daylight illumination
LIGHT_TYPES.聚光: dramatic spotlight effect, stage lighting (light effect only, no physical lamp)
LIGHT_TYPES.蘋果光: beauty light effect, soft flawless lighting (light effect only, no physical ring light)
LIGHT_TYPES.夜光: nighttime lighting, cinematic moonlight, dark night atmosphere

LIGHT_ANGLES.左: left (from the left side of the frame)
LIGHT_ANGLES.右: right (from the right side of the frame)
LIGHT_ANGLES.上: top overhead (lit from directly above, shadows cast downwards)
LIGHT_ANGLES.下: extreme underlighting (lit from directly below, like a flashlight under the chin, shadows cast upwards on the face)

LIGHT_TONES.冷: cool color temperature lighting, bluish tint
LIGHT_TONES.暖: warm color temperature lighting, golden hour

SHONEN_ARTISTS.name: 荒木飛呂彥 (JoJo)
SHONEN_ARTISTS.prompt: Hirohiko Araki (JoJo's Bizarre Adventure TV anime style) - bizarre palettes, heavy hatching, sharp angles. Strict gender difference: Males are highly muscular and edgy, females are sharp, fashionable, and beautiful.

SHONEN_ARTISTS.name: 大暮維人 (天上天下/化物語)
SHONEN_ARTISTS.prompt: Oh! great (Tenjho Tenge / Bakemonogatari high-quality anime style) - hyper-detailed fashionable urban streetwear, extremely glossy and intricate flowing hair, highly stylized sharp piercing eyes with distinct thick eyelashes, flawless and sexy character designs, dynamic extreme perspective. STRICTLY NO rollerblades, NO random mechanical gears.

SHONEN_ARTISTS.name: 桂正和 (電影少女/ZETMAN)
SHONEN_ARTISTS.prompt: Masakazu Katsura (Zetman / I''s highly detailed illustration style) - CRITICAL: Hyper-realistic beautiful female faces. MUST have photorealistic glossy, plump, realistic lips (NOT simple anime lines), distinct realistic noses, and realistic eye shapes with detailed tear ducts. Meticulously rendered hair strands and clothing folds. Blends realistic airbrush skin shading with crisp manga linework.

SHONEN_ARTISTS.name: 鳥山明 (七龍珠)
SHONEN_ARTISTS.prompt: Akira Toriyama (Dragon Ball 90s TV anime style) - retro 90s, angular eyes, spiky hair, smooth muscular shading

SHONEN_ARTISTS.name: 冨堅義博 (獵人)
SHONEN_ARTISTS.prompt: Yoshihiro Togashi (YuYu Hakusho / Hunter x Hunter 90s TV anime style) - sketchy yet masterful linework. Males can be edgy or simplistic. Females have distinct 90s cute round eyes (resembling Botan, Yukina, Keiko Yukimura, Biscuit, Shizuku, Machi).

SHONEN_ARTISTS.name: 原哲夫 (北斗神拳)
SHONEN_ARTISTS.prompt: Tetsuo Hara (Fist of the North Star Ultimate Edition manga cover style) - highly detailed dramatic gekiga illustration. Men are hyper-muscular with heavy cross-hatching. Females MUST strictly resemble Yuria: intensely beautiful, realistic facial proportions, highly detailed flowing hair, glossy realistic soft lips, dramatic high-contrast realistic lighting, intricate clothing folds.

SHONEN_ARTISTS.name: 岸本齊史 (火影忍者)
SHONEN_ARTISTS.prompt: Masashi Kishimoto (Naruto TV anime style) - clean dynamic lines, distinct eye pupil designs, ninja/shinobi streetwear, flat cel-shading anime aesthetics, slightly wide mouths, fisheye lens perspective

SHONEN_ARTISTS.name: 尾田榮一郎 (海賊王)
SHONEN_ARTISTS.prompt: Eiichiro Oda (One Piece TV anime style) - exaggerated cartoonish proportions, vibrant colors, expressive wide mouths. Strict gender difference: Males can be goofy/muscular, females often have extreme hourglass figures with large round eyes.

SHONEN_ARTISTS.name: 久保帶人 (死神)
SHONEN_ARTISTS.prompt: Tite Kubo (Bleach TV anime style) - extremely sharp angular faces, pointed chins, long thin rectangular eyes with narrow oval irises and sharp distinct pupils, dripping with urban street fashion and style

SHONEN_ARTISTS.name: 小畑健 (死亡筆記本)
SHONEN_ARTISTS.prompt: Takeshi Obata (Death Note / Bakuman illustration style) - CRITICAL: Extremely sharp V-shaped chins, pale skin. Eyes are sharp, narrow, and piercing with intensely detailed irises (dark outer ring, bright inner color). Master-level G-pen inking with hyper-detailed sharp hair strands. High-contrast, clean, meticulous gothic-leaning manga aesthetic.

SHONEN_ARTISTS.name: 井上雄彥 (灌籃高手)
SHONEN_ARTISTS.prompt: Takehiko Inoue (Slam Dunk 90s TV anime style) - HIGHLY REALISTIC 90s anime proportions. Beautiful, natural, realistic Japanese female faces (strictly resembling Haruko Akagi). NO oversized anime eyes, normal realistic eye sizes. Clean, simple 90s cel-shading. Flawless, grounded, everyday realistic aesthetic without messy brush strokes.

SHONEN_ARTISTS.name: 吾峠呼世晴 (鬼滅之刃)
SHONEN_ARTISTS.prompt: Koyoharu Gotouge (Demon Slayer TV anime style) - thick brush-like variable-weight outlines, distinct rectangular eyes, flat vibrant colors

SHONEN_ARTISTS.name: 荒川弘 (鋼之鍊金術師)
SHONEN_ARTISTS.prompt: Hiromu Arakawa (Fullmetal Alchemist Brotherhood TV anime style) - CRITICAL EYE DETAIL: Eyes MUST have a flat horizontal bottom edge and a curved upper edge, with a very simple small oval pupil floating in the middle (not touching the bottom edge). Round, slightly sturdy squarish faces with flat chins. Clean, solid, grounded uniform linework. Simple clean cel-shading.

SHONEN_ARTISTS.name: 車田正美 (聖鬥士星矢)
SHONEN_ARTISTS.prompt: Masami Kurumada / Shingo Araki (Saint Seiya / 80s classic TV anime style) - EXTREME 80s RETRO ANIME. CRITICAL NOSE DETAIL: The nose bridge MUST be drawn as a single continuous straight dark line seamlessly connected to the eyebrow (Greek profile). Massive 80s eyes with giant white block highlights. Hair is incredibly voluminous and spiky. Hard 80s cel-shading with high contrast.

SHONEN_ARTISTS.name: 堀越耕平 (我的英雄學院)
SHONEN_ARTISTS.prompt: Kohei Horikoshi (My Hero Academia TV anime style) - western comic book influenced linework, detailed expressive eyes, thick character outlines, vibrant dynamic shading

SHONEN_ARTISTS.name: 奧浩哉 (GANTZ殺戮都市)
SHONEN_ARTISTS.prompt: Hiroya Oku (Gantz TV anime style) - ultra-realistic 2D anime drawing. STRICTLY 2D INK/CEL-SHADING, ABSOLUTELY NO 3D CGI RENDERS. Realistic 2D facial proportions. STRICTLY NO Gantz suits, NO sci-fi weapons, NO mechanical parts, NO random sci-fi gear. Keep normal clothing unless specified.

SHONEN_ARTISTS.name: 藤本樹 (鏈鋸人)
SHONEN_ARTISTS.prompt: Tatsuki Fujimoto (Chainsaw Man MAPPA TV anime style) - Clean, high-budget modern cinematic anime style. CRITICAL EYE DETAIL: Eyes are extremely detailed, often with concentric circle irises, glowing rings, or distinct patterns. Thin lower eyelashes. Realistic anime lips and noses. Smooth cinematic lighting. NO messy sketch lines.

SHONEN_ARTISTS.name: 芥見下下 (咒術迴戰)
SHONEN_ARTISTS.prompt: Gege Akutami (Jujutsu Kaisen MAPPA TV anime style) - Clean, modern, cinematic anime style. Realistic but stylized anime faces. Eyes are uniquely designed with distinct lower eyelashes, sometimes slightly tired or unhinged look, highly detailed irises. Muted, cinematic color palette. NO messy lines, NO rough shading.

SHONEN_ARTISTS.name: 高橋留美子 (亂馬1/2)
SHONEN_ARTISTS.prompt: Rumiko Takahashi (Urusei Yatsura / Ranma 1/2 / Inuyasha 90s TV anime style). CRITICAL: Completely flat 2D coloring with ZERO skin shading (pure skin color). Extremely simple clean linework. Faces are wide and soft. Eyes are distinctively retro with sharp upper black lash lines and NO lower lashes. Hair has large blocky 80s/90s shine bands. Pure classic 90s Rumic World aesthetic.

SHONEN_ARTISTS.name: 北條司 (城市獵人)
SHONEN_ARTISTS.prompt: Tsukasa Hojo (City Hunter / Cat's Eye highly detailed illustration style) - EXTREMELY REALISTIC 80s mature beauty. Faces have highly realistic human proportions, meticulously drawn glossy realistic lips, and realistic noses. Beautiful, elegant, mature women. Exquisite 80s city pop aesthetic. Smooth, realistic painted shading.

SHONEN_ARTISTS.name: 藤島康介 (幸運女神)
SHONEN_ARTISTS.prompt: Kosuke Fujishima (Oh My Goddess! 1993 OVA high-quality 90s anime illustration style). CRITICAL: 90s retro goddess aesthetic. Extremely long, wildly detailed flowing hair with thousands of fine individual strands. Faces are elegant long ovals. Eyes are wide and highly detailed with multiple sparkling catchlights and fine eyelashes. Soft pastel watercolor-like 90s anime shading.

SHONEN_ARTISTS.name: 貞本義行 (新世紀福音戰士)
SHONEN_ARTISTS.prompt: Yoshiyuki Sadamoto (Evangelion / Nadia 90s TV anime style) - slender realistic 90s anatomy, clean precise inking. Females MUST strictly resemble Asuka Langley, Rei Ayanami, Misato Katsuragi, or Nadia Ra Alwar. CRITICAL EYE DETAIL: Sharp melancholic eyes with very narrow, vertically elongated oval irises (細長橢圓虹膜), strictly NOT round. Small distinct pupils.

SHONEN_ARTISTS.name: 空知英秋 (銀魂)
SHONEN_ARTISTS.prompt: Hideaki Sorachi (Gintama TV anime style) - clean expressive linework, distinct Gintama facial structures. Females resemble Tae Shimura or Kagura: sharp upper eyelashes, detailed oval irises with gradient shading. Males have sharp or deadpan eyes. Edo-period historical fantasy aesthetic mixed with modern anime cel-shading.

SHONEN_ARTISTS.name: 佐伯俊 (食戟之靈)
SHONEN_ARTISTS.prompt: Shun Saeki (Food Wars! TV anime style) - hyper-detailed pristine digital anime rendering, highly attractive sensual character designs, extremely lush and detailed glossy hair, perfectly drawn body proportions

SHONEN_ARTISTS.name: 村田雄介 (一拳超人)
SHONEN_ARTISTS.prompt: Yusuke Murata (One Punch Man TV anime style) - absolute master-level perspective, flawless hyper-detailed dynamic action anatomy, incredibly crisp digital linework, comic book superhero crossover aesthetic

SHONEN_ARTISTS.name: 真島浩 (魔導少年)
SHONEN_ARTISTS.prompt: Hiro Mashima (Fairy Tail TV anime style) - spiky hair, highly simplified yet dynamic proportions, clean bold outlines, expressive large anime eyes, high fantasy guild aesthetic

SHONEN_ARTISTS.name: 青山剛昌 (名偵探柯南)
SHONEN_ARTISTS.prompt: Gosho Aoyama (Detective Conan 90s TV anime style) - extremely distinct pointy noses, large oval eyes, huge ears, simple 90s mystery anime linework

SHONEN_ARTISTS.name: 矢吹健太朗 (出包王女)
SHONEN_ARTISTS.prompt: Kentaro Yabuki (To LOVE-Ru TV anime style) - ultimate ecchi rom-com aesthetic, hyper-cute soft female faces, blushing cheeks, perfectly drawn fluid hair, extreme attention to soft body curves and glossy skin

SHONEN_ARTISTS.name: 和月伸宏 (神劍闖江湖)
SHONEN_ARTISTS.prompt: Nobuhiro Watsuki (Rurouni Kenshin 90s TV anime style) - classic 90s samurai historical anime aesthetic, sharp but realistic 90s anime eyes, clean linework, traditional Japanese clothing vibes, solid 90s cel-shading.

SHOJO_ARTISTS.name: CLAMP (庫洛魔法使)
SHOJO_ARTISTS.prompt: CLAMP (Cardcaptor Sakura / Chobits TV anime style) - extremely thin delicate lines, huge vertically elongated eyes with intricate highlights, extremely slender and elongated limbs, elaborate costumes, feathers and ribbons

SHOJO_ARTISTS.name: 武內直子 (美少女戰士)
SHOJO_ARTISTS.prompt: Naoko Takeuchi (Sailor Moon 90s TV anime style) - 90s shojo anime, watery sparkling eyes, pastel colors, extremely long legs, elegant magical girl aesthetic, delicate flowing hair

SHOJO_ARTISTS.name: 渡瀨悠宇 (夢幻遊戲)
SHOJO_ARTISTS.prompt: Yuu Watase (Fushigi Yugi 90s TV anime style) - dramatic 90s shojo romance, large sad sparkling eyes, historical Chinese fantasy outfits, beautiful long-haired men, soft flowing lines

SHOJO_ARTISTS.name: 矢澤愛 (NANA)
SHOJO_ARTISTS.prompt: Ai Yazawa (Nana / Paradise Kiss TV anime style) - extremely high foreheads, incredibly skinny elongated figures with thin necks, huge round eyes with heavy dark eyelashes/mascara, stylish 2000s punk/high-fashion aesthetic, stylized proportions resembling Eiichiro Oda's exaggeration

SHOJO_ARTISTS.name: 神尾葉子 (流星花園)
SHOJO_ARTISTS.prompt: Yoko Kamio (Boys Over Flowers 90s TV anime style) - late 90s classic shojo, messy stylish hair, rich school uniforms, distinct 90s shojo eyes with large white highlights, expressive romantic comedy faces

SHOJO_ARTISTS.name: 河下水希 (草莓100%)
SHOJO_ARTISTS.prompt: Mizuki Kawashita (Strawberry 100% TV anime style) - extremely high-quality soft shojo/shonen rom-com art, extremely beautiful and cute female faces, highly detailed glossy eyes, lush hair, slight ecchi aesthetic

FRAMING_PROMPTS.headshot: **Framing (CRITICAL):** EXTREME CLOSE-UP HEADSHOT. Face and head ONLY. The head MUST be scaled so large that it takes up 90% of the canvas. The character MUST NOT be floating. The bottom of the neck/jawline MUST touch and be cut off exactly by the absolute bottom border of the canvas. Zero empty space below the subject.
FRAMING_PROMPTS.chest: **Framing (CRITICAL):** Bust/Chest-up. Shoulders and head maximally fill the canvas. The character MUST NOT be floating. The bottom of the chest MUST touch and be cut off exactly by the absolute bottom border of the canvas. Zero empty space below the subject.
FRAMING_PROMPTS.halfBody: **Framing (CRITICAL):** Half-body (Waist up). Head, body, and hands maximally fill the canvas. The character MUST NOT be floating. The bottom of the waist MUST touch and be cut off exactly by the absolute bottom border of the canvas. Zero empty space below the subject.
FRAMING_PROMPTS.threeQuarter: **Framing (CRITICAL):** Three-quarter portrait (Knees up). Head, body, hips, and thighs maximally fill the canvas. The character MUST NOT be floating. The bottom of the legs/knees MUST touch and be cut off exactly by the absolute bottom border of the canvas. Zero empty space below the subject.
FRAMING_PROMPTS.fullBody: **Framing:** Full-Body. Subject should be as large as possible, spanning from the very top to the very bottom of the canvas. Entire character from head to toe must be visible without being cropped out.

dark-creature.template: - **Creature:** Convert the subject into a {en}. Monstrous, terrifying, dark fantasy aesthetic.

victorian.template: - **Fashion:** Authentic 19th-century Victorian era historical clothing, elegant dresses, corsets, top hats, elegant suits. NO specific modern or ACG character named Victoria.

blizzard-universe.template: - **Blizzard Character Cosplay:** {en}. Highly detailed chunky armor or signature outfit.

new-year.template: - **Outfit:** Traditional vibrant red/gold Lunar New Year attire (Tangzhuang, Qipao, Hanfu).

cyberpunk.template: - **Cyberpunk Role:** {en}. Cyberware, neon accents, futuristic clothing.

steampunk.template: - **Steampunk Role:** {en}. Brass, gears, leather, Victorian fashion.

fantasy.template: - **Fantasy Class:** {en}. Epic high fantasy RPG attire.

xianxia.template: - **Xianxia:** Transcendent cultivator in flowing ancient Chinese robes (e.g., white silk, jade).

magical-girl.template: - **Role:** {en}. Frilly dresses, magical glowing props, anime aesthetic.

disney-princess.template: - **Princess:** Cosplaying as {en}. Signature dress and accessories.

STYLE_PROMPTS.lego:
**Art Style (Lego Minifigure / 樂高):** 
- **Material:** Shiny ABS plastic. 
- **Forms:** Blocky, cylindrical head, C-shaped hands, blocky legs. 
- **Face:** Painted simple decal face on the cylindrical head.{chibiProp}
STYLE_PROMPTS.doodle:
**Art Style (Children's Doodle / 兒童塗鴉):** 
- **Execution:** Very rough, messy, naive drawing. Crayons or markers. 
- **Forms:** Highly simplified, disproportionate. Flat, no shading.{chibiProp} 
**NEGATIVE PROMPTS:** detailed, realistic, perfect anatomy, 3D render.
STYLE_PROMPTS.childrens-book:
**Art Style (Children's Book Illustration / 童書繪本):** 
- **Execution:** Whimsical, charming, soft textures (watercolor/colored pencil). 
- **Mood:** Innocent, storytelling, warm.{chibiProp} 
**NEGATIVE PROMPTS:** dark, realistic, sharp digital edges.
STYLE_PROMPTS.clay:
**Art Style (Claymation / Clay Sculpture):** Stop-motion modeling clay sculpture. 
- **Material & Texture (CRITICAL):** Distinct texture of real modeling clay (plasticine/polymer). Show subtle imperfections like fingerprints, smudges, tool marks. 
- **Lighting:** Soft practical lighting mimicking real-world studio setup. 
- **Forms & Color:** Soft, rounded handmade shapes. Rich, saturated clay colors.{chibiProp} 
**NEGATIVE PROMPTS:** photorealistic, smooth perfect digital 3D look, retaining original photo body.
STYLE_PROMPTS.popmart:
**Art Style (POPMART Cosplay / 潮玩Cosplay):** A famous POPMART character (Molly, Skullpanda, Dimoo, etc.) will cosplay as the person. 
- **Clothing & Hairstyle (CRITICAL):** EXACT clothing and hairstyle from the photo. 
- **Facial Likeness (Subtle Fusion):** Character's face remains fundamentally their own, subtly blending the essence of the person. 
- **Proportions:** Chibi (large oversized head, small body). 
- **Material:** Seamless high-quality vinyl, smooth high-gloss or semi-gloss sheen. NO visible joints. 
**NEGATIVE PROMPTS:** 2D, drawing, articulation joints, visible seams, fabric, retaining original photo body.
STYLE_PROMPTS.bjd:
**Art Style (Ball-Jointed Doll / BJD):** Convert the subject into a high-quality, physical Ball-Jointed Doll. 
- **Material:** Polished cast resin with a semi-matte or satin sheen.
